data.title: Dustin Sedgwick named Chief Marketing Officer at Intapp (NASDAQ: INTA), brings tech and finance industry expertise.
data.description: Intapp, a renowned global provider of AI-powered solutions for professionals in advisory, capital markets, and legal sectors, has revealed that Dustin Sedgwick is joining the company as Chief Marketing Officer. Intapp's CEO, John Hall, expressed enthusiasm about Sedgwick's appointment, emphasizing his background in cultivating high-growth ventures within the technology and finance realms. Sedgwick's inclusion in the Intapp leadership team comes at a crucial time as the company progresses on its growth trajectory. Notably, Intapp is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol INTA.

data.title: Stock market drops as Alibaba news affects Nvidia and AI stocks, not signaling repeat of DeepSeek crisis.
data.description: On Friday, the stock market experienced a decline, resulting in the loss of weekly gains due to Alibaba's impact on Nvidia and AI stocks. However, this event should not be compared to the DeepSeek moment. Dow Jones Futures were affected by the news related to Alibaba, influencing Nvidia and AI stocks. The significance of this occurrence should not be exaggerated like the DeepSeek 2.0 incident.

data.title: Elastic stock falls after earnings beat in Q1, despite positive AI comments. Market reacts negatively.
data.description: Elastic's stock experienced a decline on Friday, even though the company specializing in enterprise data software exceeded expectations in its fiscal Q1 results. Despite reporting positive earnings and receiving favorable commentary on artificial intelligence, the stock saw a reversal in its upward momentum.
Reviewing performance for Q2 and first half of 2025; analyzing revenue and growth data for the past six months.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. reported Q1 earnings; total net assets $983 million, NAV per share $11.40.
data.description: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. reported its earnings for the first quarter ending June 30, 2025. The Fund's total net assets as of June 30, 2025, stood at $983,263,245, showing an increase from $966,409,431 on March 31, 2025, and $956,898,954 on June 30, 2024. The net asset value per share on June 30, 2025, was $11.40, calculated based on 86,229,677 shares of common stock in circulation. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com, detailing the financial performance of the company for the mentioned period.

data.title: Synergy CHC Corp. closes $4.375M public offering, selling 1,750,000 common stocks at $2.50 per share. Underwriters have option for 262,500 additional shares.
data.description: Maine-based Synergy CHC Corp. (Nasdaq: SNYR) recently wrapped up an underwritten public offering, selling 1,750,000 common stock shares at $2.50 each. This move generated $4.375 million in total proceeds before subtracting underwriting expenses. Furthermore, Synergy has given the underwriters a 45-day option to buy an extra 262,500 shares at the same price, minus discounts and commissions.

data.title: PicoCELA Inc. received a Nasdaq notification due to minimum bid price deficiency on Aug 30, 2025.
data.description: On August 30, 2025, a Tokyo-headquartered enterprise wireless mesh solutions provider, PicoCELA Inc. (Nasdaq: PCLA), disclosed receiving a letter (the "Notification Letter") from the Listings Qualifications Department regarding unspecified matters.

data.title: Bitcoin lawsuit strategy scrapped as investors drop the case. Dismissal with prejudice forbids re-filing.- Duoro Labs counsel.
data.description: The general counsel for Duoro Labs stated that a dismissal with prejudice prevents the plaintiffs from amending the complaint and refiling the lawsuit.
